tickers.catalyst: Snowflake reports Q1 FY2027 earnings BEFORE MARKET OPEN Tuesday May 27, 2026. Consensus: EPS $0.32, revenue $1.324B. Q4 2026 massively beat expectations with EPS $0.32 vs -$0.10 estimate (+420% beat), per Public.com. Stock up 4% to $172.20 ahead of earnings, per Perplexity Finance. Cloud data warehouse leader with strong momentum. Last quarter RPO (remaining performance obligation) accelerated 37% YoY to $7.88B. Sector: Software/Tech (XLK +2.34% week).
tickers.momentum: Cloud infrastructure / AI data play. XLK +25.30% YTD.
tickers.thesis: Cloud data warehouse leader with Q4 420% beat momentum, Q1 earnings catalyst May 27 BMO, AI/data infrastructure play

tickers.catalyst: Salesforce reports Q1 FY2027 earnings Wednesday May 28, 2026. Consensus: EPS $3.11-3.13, revenue $11.03-11.08B per CNBC. Q4 2026 beat massively: EPS $3.81 vs $3.05 estimate (+25% beat), revenue $11.20B vs $11.17B, per CNBC Feb 25 2026 report. Citi reduced PT May 12 ahead of Q1, creating setup opportunity. Stock has momentum from Q4, Agentforce AI product cycle. Sector: Software (XLK +2.34% week, +25.30% YTD).
tickers.momentum: Enterprise SaaS / AI agent play. XLK strong.
tickers.thesis: Enterprise SaaS leader with Q4 beat momentum, Q1 earnings May 28, Agentforce AI product driving growth

tickers.catalyst: Marvell Technology reports earnings May 27, 2026 per Zacks. Consensus EPS $0.80. Q3 FY2026 posted record revenue $2.074B (+37% YoY), data center revenue $1.518B (73% of total, +38% YoY). Management raised FY2027 data center growth guidance above prior expectations. AI infrastructure play: custom ASIC programs, optical interconnect for hyperscalers. Up 163% past year, +92.82% YTD per 24/7 Wall St. Acquired Celestial AI to scale optical roadmap, $1.3B stock buyback Q3. PEG ratio 0.6x (Peter Lynch undervalued threshold). Sector: Semiconductors (XLK +25.30% YTD).
tickers.momentum: Semiconductor / AI infrastructure. XLK strong, semis leading.
tickers.thesis: AI infrastructure semiconductor with May 27 earnings, data center revenue 73% of total growing 38% YoY, 0.6x PEG undervalued

Sector: Tech hardware.
tickers.momentum: PC hardware / AI infrastructure. Lenovo catalyst lifting sector.

tickers.catalyst: Exxon Mobil: Top holding in Energy Select Sector SPDR (XLE) at 22.59% weight per Investing.com. XLE is strongest performing sector YTD with +45.58% return, +9.19% 3-month, +6.8% 2-week per Barchart and Robinhood. Energy sector benefiting from supply discipline and geopolitical risk premium (Iran tensions reference in May sources). XLE avg daily volume 37.12M, highly liquid. XOM as largest component is direct play on energy momentum. Thursday 5/28 PCE inflation data (consensus +0.5% MoM) - if hot, energy benefits as inflation hedge.
tickers.momentum: Energy sector leader. XLE +45.58% YTD, best performing sector.
tickers.thesis: Energy sector leader, 22.59% of XLE which is +45.58% YTD (best sector), inflation hedge ahead of Thu PCE data

tickers.catalyst: Micron Technology: Memory/AI play with 0.2x PEG ratio (Peter Lynch extremely undervalued) per 24/7 Wall St May 13, 2026. Fiscal Q2 2026 revenue $23.86B (+196% YoY), DRAM revenue +207% YoY, driven by high-bandwidth memory (HBM) for AI accelerators. 2026 HBM supply already sold out under long-term contracts. Forward PE 5x with 70%+ expected earnings growth. AI infrastructure demand smoothing traditional memory cycles. Sector: Semiconductors (XLK +25.30% YTD). Note: Memory is cyclical but AI creating structural demand.
tickers.momentum: Memory/AI infrastructure. XLK momentum, HBM critical for AI.
tickers.thesis: Memory/HBM leader with 0.2x PEG (extreme undervalue), Q2 revenue +196% YoY, 2026 HBM sold out, AI structural demand

tickers.catalyst: Marathon Petroleum: Q1 2026 results reported May 4, 2026 per PR Newswire and Marathon IR. Stock up 60% in 2026 per Tikr May 18. Energy refining play benefiting from XLE sector momentum (+45.58% YTD). As XLE component (oil/gas consumable fuels 89.80% of index), MPC benefits from energy sector leadership and refining margins. Refining margins strong on tight supply. Sector: Energy (XLE best performing sector).
tickers.thesis: Energy refiner up 60% YTD riding XLE momentum (+45.58%), Q1 reported May 4, refining margins strong
